title: Smart Data Models - OpenStreetMap / OSMPlace
description: Geographical places from OpenStreetMap tagged with place=*. This data model is a derivative work based on the OpenStreetMap Wiki, licensed under CC BY-SA 2.0 by OpenStreetMap contributors.

type.description: Property. NGSI Entity type. It has to be OSMPlace

osmId.description: Property. The original OpenStreetMap element integer identifier. Model:'https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Elements'

osmType.description: Property. The type of the original OpenStreetMap element.

osmLastModified.description: Property. Timestamp of the last modification of the OSM element. Model:'https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Elements'

placeType.description: Property. The OSM place tag classifying the territory or populated area. Model:'https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Key:place'

population.description: Property. Total population of the place. Model:'https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Key:population'

capital.description: Property. Indicates if the place is a capital (4=territory/region, 2=country). Model:'https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Key:capital'

seeAlso.description: Property. List of URIs pointing to additional resources.
